samples.inputMd: Le rapport doit être remis avant la fin du mois afin que la direction puisse le présenter au conseil.
fragments: The report must be submitted by the end of the month so that management can present it to the board.

samples.inputMd: La nouvelle politique de télétravail entrera en vigueur dès le premier lundi de septembre.
fragments: The new remote work policy will come into effect starting the first Monday in September.

samples.inputMd: Nous avons constaté une amélioration nette de la satisfaction client depuis le déploiement de la mise à jour.
fragments: We have observed a clear improvement in customer satisfaction since the deployment of the update.

samples.inputMd: Le jardin derrière la maison était rempli de lavande et de romarin, et les abeilles butinaient sans relâche.
fragments: The garden behind the house was filled with lavender and rosemary, and the bees were busily buzzing.

samples.inputMd: Bien que les résultats soient encourageants, les auteurs rappellent que l’échantillon reste limité.
fragments: While the results are encouraging, the authors remind that the sample remains limited.

samples.inputMd: The committee will meet on Thursday afternoon to review the quarterly budget and approve the new hiring plan.
fragments: Le comité se réunira jeudi après-midi pour examiner le budget trimestriel et approuver le nouveau plan de recrutement.

samples.inputMd: Our team has spent the last three months redesigning the onboarding flow so that new users reach their first success faster.
fragments: Notre équipe a passé les trois derniers mois à redessiner le processus d'intégration afin que les nouveaux utilisateurs atteignent leur premier succès plus rapidement.

samples.inputMd: Please remember to back up your files before the migration, as the old server will be decommissioned next week.
fragments: Veuillez n'oublier de sauvegarder vos fichiers avant la migration, car l'ancien serveur sera mis hors service la semaine prochaine.

samples.inputMd: The garden behind the house was full of lavender and rosemary, and the bees worked steadily through the warm morning.
fragments: Le jardin derrière la maison était rempli de lavande et de romarin, et les abeilles travaillaient sans relâche pendant la matinée chaude.

samples.inputMd: Although the results were promising, the authors caution that the sample size was small and further studies are needed.
fragments: Bien que les résultats soient prometteurs, les auteurs mettent en garde que la taille de l'échantillon était petite et que des études supplémentaires sont nécessaires.

samples.inputMd: The committee will meet on Thursday afternoon to review the quarterly budget and approve the new hiring plan.
fragments: Der Ausschuss wird sich am Donnerstagnachmittag treffen, um den vierteljährlichen Haushalt zu überprüfen und den neuen Einstellungsplan zu genehmigen.

samples.inputMd: Our team has spent the last three months redesigning the onboarding flow so that new users reach their first success faster.
fragments: Unser Team hat die letzten drei Monate damit verbracht, den Onboarding-Prozess neu zu gestalten, damit neue Nutzer schneller ihren ersten Erfolg erreichen.

samples.inputMd: Please remember to back up your files before the migration, as the old server will be decommissioned next week.
fragments: Bitte denken Sie daran, Ihre Dateien vor der Migration zu sichern, da der alte Server nächste Woche außer Betrieb genommen wird.

samples.inputMd: The garden behind the house was full of lavender and rosemary, and the bees worked steadily through the warm morning.
fragments: Der Garten hinter dem Haus war voller Lavendel und Rosmarin, und die Bienen arbeiteten fleißig durch den warmen Morgen.

samples.inputMd: Although the results were promising, the authors caution that the sample size was small and further studies are needed.
fragments: Obwohl die Ergebnisse vielversprechend waren, warnen die Autoren, dass die Stichprobengröße klein war und weitere Studien erforderlich sind.

samples.inputMd: The committee will meet on Thursday afternoon to review the quarterly budget and approve the new hiring plan.
fragments: El comité se reunirá el jueves por la tarde para revisar el presupuesto trimestral y aprobar el nuevo plan de contratación.

samples.inputMd: Our team has spent the last three months redesigning the onboarding flow so that new users reach their first success faster.
fragments: Nuestro equipo ha dedicado los últimos tres meses a rediseñar el flujo de incorporación para que los nuevos usuarios alcancen su primer éxito más rápido.

samples.inputMd: Please remember to back up your files before the migration, as the old server will be decommissioned next week.
fragments: Por favor, recuerde hacer una copia de seguridad de sus archivos antes de la migración, ya que el servidor antiguo será descomisionado la próxima semana.

samples.inputMd: The garden behind the house was full of lavender and rosemary, and the bees worked steadily through the warm morning.
fragments: El jardín detrás de la casa estaba lleno de lavanda y romero, y las abejas trabajaban sin cesar durante la cálida mañana.

samples.inputMd: Although the results were promising, the authors caution that the sample size was small and further studies are needed.
fragments: Aunque los resultados fueron prometedores, los autores advierten que el tamaño de la muestra fue pequeño y se necesitan más estudios.

samples.inputMd: The committee will meet on Thursday afternoon to review the quarterly budget and approve the new hiring plan.
fragments: Il comitato si riunirà giovedì pomeriggio per rivedere il bilancio trimestrale e approvare il nuovo piano di assunzioni.

samples.inputMd: Our team has spent the last three months redesigning the onboarding flow so that new users reach their first success faster.
fragments: Il nostro team ha trascorso gli ultimi tre mesi a ridisegnare il flusso di onboarding affinché i nuovi utenti raggiungano il loro primo successo più velocemente.

samples.inputMd: Please remember to back up your files before the migration, as the old server will be decommissioned next week.
fragments: Ricorda di fare il backup dei tuoi file prima della migrazione, poiché il vecchio server sarà dismesso la prossima settimana.

samples.inputMd: The garden behind the house was full of lavender and rosemary, and the bees worked steadily through the warm morning.
fragments: Il giardino dietro la casa era pieno di lavanda e rosmarino, e le api lavoravano incessantemente nella calda mattinata.

samples.inputMd: Although the results were promising, the authors caution that the sample size was small and further studies are needed.
fragments: Sebbene i risultati siano stati promettenti, gli autori mettono in guardia sul fatto che la dimensione del campione era piccola e sono necessari ulteriori studi.

samples.inputMd: Salut, j’ai vu ton mail. Bon, en gros on peut pas livrer mardi, faut décaler.
fragments: Bonjour, j’ai pris connaissance de votre message. Malheureusement, la livraison prévue pour mardi ne pourra pas avoir lieu. Il sera nécessaire de reporter la date.

samples.inputMd: Les equipe on travailler tres dur ce trimestre et il on atteint tout leur objectif.
fragments: L'équipe a travaillé très dur ce trimestre et ils ont atteint tous leurs objectifs.

samples.inputMd: Send me the numbers now, I can’t wait any longer for this.
fragments: Could you please send me the numbers at your earliest convenience? I would greatly appreciate it.

samples.inputMd: Their is alot of reasons why the project was delay, but we is back on track now.
fragments: There are a lot of reasons why the project was delayed, but we are back on track now.

samples.inputMd: Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren, hiermit teile ich Ihnen die Verschiebung des Termins mit.
fragments: Hey Leute, nur kurz: Der Termin wurde verschoben!

samples.inputMd: Oye, al final no llego a la reunión, tengo lío. Lo vemos otro día, ¿vale?
fragments: Lamentablemente, no podré asistir a la reunión. Tengo un compromiso previo. ¿Podríamos reprogramarlo para otro momento?

samples.inputMd: Mandami subito il preventivo, non ho tutto il giorno da aspettare.
fragments: Potresti gentilmente inviarmi il preventivo al più presto? Apprezzerei molto la tua tempestività.

samples.inputMd:
## Références de liens \(Link references\)

Voici un lien via {{REF:scribe-ref-0:référence vers le chapitre suivant}} et un autre {{REF:scribe-ref-1:lien nommé vers le chapitre HTML inline}}.

## Footnotes

- Ceci est la première note de bas de page. [^scribe-fn-0]
- Ceci est une note plus détaillée. Elle peut contenir plusieurs lignes. [^scribe-fn-1]
fragments:
## Footnotes
- This is the first footnote. [^scribe-fn-0]
- This is a more detailed note. It can contain multiple lines. [^scribe-fn-1]

samples.inputMd:
Résultats trimestriels :
[TABLE:0][CELL:0,0]Trimestre[/CELL][CELL:0,1]Revenu[/CELL][CELL:1,0]T1[/CELL][CELL:1,1]120 k€[/CELL][CELL:2,0]T2[/CELL][CELL:2,1]148 k€[/CELL][/TABLE]

fragments: The detail appears in {{REF:scribe-ref-1:Section 2}} of the document, right after the introduction.

samples.inputMd: Further details are given in {{REF:scribe-ref-3:Section 4}} of the appendix.
fragments: Weitere Einzelheiten sind in {{REF:scribe-ref-3:Abschnitt 4}} des Anhangs angegeben.

samples.inputMd: Puedes ver los datos completos en {{REF:scribe-ref-7:Anexo A}}, está todo ahí.
fragments: La información completa está disponible en {{REF:scribe-ref-7:Anexo A}}.

samples.inputMd:
Comme indiqué dans {{REF:scribe-ref-2:Annexe B}}, voici les chiffres du mois :
[TABLE:0][CELL:0,0]Mois[/CELL][CELL:0,1]Ventes[/CELL][CELL:1,0]Janvier[/CELL][CELL:1,1]42[/CELL][/TABLE]

samples.inputMd: The method was validated in three independent trials[^scribe-fn-1] before the public release.
fragments: La méthode a été validée dans trois essais indépendants[^scribe-fn-1] avant la publication publique.
